title: Create MCP wrapper for generate_brand_healthcare
description: Current: MCP tools include fintech and other vertical wrappers but no healthcare tool entrypoint. Expected: a new tool wrapper parses BrandIdentity JSON and returns formatted healthcare output through server.tool.
acceptance_criteria: Tool name is exactly generate_brand_healthcare with a clear healthcare-specific description
Handler parses brand JSON into BrandIdentity and serializes generator output as text content
Wrapper imports from established module paths without introducing circular imports
completion_summary: MCP wrapper generate_brand_healthcare exists and serializes healthcare generator output through brand-tool helper.
